# s2_default_location (Data Source)

Fetches the default S2 basin placement location for the account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "s2_default_location" "current" {}

output "default_location" {
  value = data.s2_default_location.current.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `is_private` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
